prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the **EA888 Gen 2 (CDLF)** 2.0L TSI engine, targeting 350 HP and 369 lb-ft torque with a **Garrett GTX3071R Gen II** turbocharger, **APR High-Flow Carbon Fiber Intake System**, and **APR Catted Downpipe** (200-cell), paired with a **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 Daily** for drivetrain reliability

KW Suspension **Clubsport Coilovers** with **3-way adjustable damping** and **camber-adjustable top mounts**, specifically valved for the Scirocco R’s **MQB-derived PQ35 platform**, combined with **H&R 25mm Front / 20mm Rear Anti-Roll Bars** and **Whiteline Adjustable Rear Toe Arms** to eliminate torque steer under hard launches

Brembo **GT 6-Piston Front Brake Kit** (380mm rotors) with **Ferodo DS2500 Racing Pads**, paired with **Brembo 4-Piston Rear Calipers** (330mm rotors) and **Goodridge G-Stop Stainless Steel Brake Lines**, fed by a **Motul RBF660 Racing Brake Fluid** flush for fade resistance under track use
estetica: Rocket Bunny **V3 Widebody Kit** (Scirocco R-specific, not a generic Golf/Rabbit fitment) with **custom carbon fiber overfenders**, **aluminum front splitter**, and **rear diffuser**, all painted in **VW Pure White (L90E) with matte black accents**

OEM+ **VW R-Line Carbon Fiber Mirror Caps** (gloss finish) paired with **VMR V710 19x9.5 ET35 Wheels** in **Gunmetal** (staggered setup: 235/35/19 front, 255/30/19 rear) and **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 Connect** tires for track-day grip

Full **VW Motorsport GTI TCR** livery kit (carbon fiber hood, side skirts, and rear valance) with **custom LED taillight overlays** (red smoked lenses) and **Osram Night Breaker Laser H7/H11 bulbs** for aggressive front-end illumination
